sqlite_removal_evidence: No .sql.ts schema files exist — only .pg.sql.ts files
Zero imports from drizzle-orm/sqlite in packages/opencode/src/
AGENTS.md line 3: 'SQLite schemas have been deleted'
package.json #db alias resolves all targets (bun/node/default) to ./src/storage/db.pg.ts

pg_migrations.description: Initial full schema dump. Creates 15 tables with all columns, indexes (10), and foreign keys (10). Monolithic squash of final SQLite schema state.
Adds runtime_events table (24 columns) + 8 indexes. Net-new schema — never existed in SQLite.
Adds 3 coordination tables for cross-session coordination. Net-new schema — never existed in SQLite.
Alters coordination_fan_out.task_ids column type from text to jsonb.

migration_runner.mechanism: For PGlite: reads migration files via readMigrationFiles(), iterates, calls client.exec(sql). For node-postgres: uses drizzle-orm/node-postgres/migrator migrate(). Migration folder resolved as new URL('../../migration-pg', import.meta.url).pathname.

callers.context: makePgAdapter() — fire-and-forget at adapter construction. Only runs for remote PG path (OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL set). Errors logged, not propagated.
runMigrations() — CLI db:migrate command. Awaits completion. Defaults to :memory: (PGlite).

migration_runner.local_pglite_gap_detail: makeLocalPgAdapter() (adapter.ts:86-153) does NOT call applyMigrations(). The db.ts Client() factory (line 64-76) also does NOT call applyMigrations(). Local PGlite databases do not auto-apply migrations at startup — only the CLI migrate.ts script can apply them.
migration_runner.pre_existing_finding_staleness: Finding ses_187bc95c claiming 'applyMigrations defined at db.pg.ts:25 but never called' is STALE — it IS called at adapter.ts:194 (remote PG) and migrate.ts:20 (CLI). However, it is NOT called for local PGlite.

local_pglite_migration_gap.description: Local PGlite databases do not get migrations auto-applied at startup. The makeLocalPgAdapter() function (adapter.ts:86) and db.ts Client() factory (line 64) both skip applyMigrations(). Only the remote PG path (makePgAdapter, adapter.ts:194) auto-applies migrations. Users running locally with PGlite must manually run 'bun run db:migrate' to apply schema changes.

affected_code_paths.note: No call to applyMigrations(); skipMigrations flag read but never used

local_pglite_migration_gap.workaround: Run 'bun run db:migrate' from packages/opencode/ to manually apply PG migrations to local PGlite

dialect_detection.mechanism: Single dialect: PostgreSQL always. SQLite removed entirely.

backend_selection.logic: If connectionString is ':memory:', starts with '/', or starts with 'file:' → PGlite (embedded PG in WASM). Otherwise → node-postgres (real PG server via pg Pool).
backend_selection.env_var_primary: OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL (adapter.ts:396, database-config.ts:5) — the PRIMARY switch. When set, creates remote PG connection. When unset, uses local PGlite.
backend_selection.env_var_local_path: OPENCODE_DB (flag.ts:47, db.ts:43-45) — controls local PGlite file path. Can be ':memory:', absolute path, or relative path.

dialect_detection.db_init_chain: db.ts Database.init() → import {init} from '#db' → db.pg.ts init() → PGlite or node-postgres
dialect_detection.alias_resolution: package.json imports.#db → ./src/storage/db.pg.ts (all targets: bun, node, default)

gap_analysis.verdict: NO SCHEMA COVERAGE GAP — SQLite is intentionally fully removed, PG has 4 migrations covering all 19 tables across all 10 schema files. HOWEVER: local PGlite does not auto-apply migrations — see local_pglite_migration_gap.
evidence: All 19 tables across 4 PG migrations match the 10 .pg.sql.ts schema files
Schema barrel (schema.ts) only re-exports from .pg.sql.ts files
drizzle.config.pg.ts scans ./src/**/*.pg.sql.ts — the canonical schema source
No SQLite schema files, configs, or migration directories remain
Migration runner is active for remote PG (called at startup) and CLI (manual)
Test file test/storage/migration.pg.test.ts verifies applyMigrations works end-to-end with PGlite

dead_code_and_debt.issue: Reads from path.join(dir, 'migration') — a directory that no longer exists. Would throw at build time if reached.
dead_code_and_debt.recommendation: Remove the dead migration-loading code or point it at migration-pg/ instead.

dead_code_and_debt.issue: Likely has the same dead reference to the deleted migration/ directory.

Variable names still use 'sqlite' terminology (sqliteAdapter, sqliteDb, sqliteTx) but the actual implementation wraps PGlite + remote PG. Comment at line 3 says 'Wraps SQLite (primary) and Postgres (shadow)' — misleading.
dead_code_and_debt.recommendation: Rename to localAdapter/localDb/localTx and update comments to reflect PG reality.

dead_code_and_debt.issue: Type exported as SQLiteTransactionOptions with _tag: 'sqlite' — but it's actually used with PGlite (Postgres dialect). Already marked @deprecated.
dead_code_and_debt.recommendation: Remove once all consumers migrated. Rename to LocalTransactionOptions.

dead_code_and_debt.issue: DatabaseFlags type includes skipMigrations but the flag is read in readRuntimeFlags() (line 27-31) yet never wired through to gate applyMigrations. The Client() factory reads flags but ignores skipMigrations entirely.
dead_code_and_debt.recommendation: Either wire skipMigrations to gate applyMigrations in the local PGlite path or remove the unused flag.

dead_code_and_debt.issue: getChannelPath returns 'opencode.db' filename — legacy SQLite convention. Content is PGlite.
dead_code_and_debt.recommendation: Consider renaming to opencode.pg. Low priority since .db is just a file extension convention.

recommendation: No schema migration gap exists — 4 PG migrations cover all 19 tables across all 10 PG schema files. SQLite is fully removed. However, there is a LOCAL PGLITE MIGRATION GAP: makeLocalPgAdapter() never calls applyMigrations(), so local PGlite databases don't auto-apply schema changes at startup. Users must run 'bun run db:migrate' manually. Additionally, 6 pieces of dead code referencing SQLite conventions remain and should be cleaned up.
